title: Silhouette Analysis v4
description: Schema for a fully-enriched 2D character silhouette analysis document (v4.0). Covers contour geometry, anatomical landmarks, proportions, curvature, shape descriptors, biomechanics, volumetric estimates, and complexity metrics. All spatial values use a head-unit (HU) coordinate system where dx = horizontal distance from midline and dy = vertical position (0 = crown, increasing downward).

point2d.description: A [dx, dy] coordinate pair in head-units.

volume_method.description: A single volumetric estimation method result.

meta.description: Processing metadata, classification, quality metrics, and section inventory.

source.description: Path or URI of the source image.

crop_rect_px.description: [x, y, width, height] crop rectangle in pixels.

midline_px.description: Horizontal pixel coordinate of the figure midline.

scale_px_to_hu.description: Conversion factor: multiply px by this to get head-units.

scores.description: Quality scores for each extraction method.

shape_prior.description: Optional shape prior used during extraction. Null if none.

contour.description: Closed-loop contour: right side (indices 0..N-1) is authoritative, left side is mirrored. Each element is [dx, dy] in head-units.

landmarks.description: Anatomical and geometric feature points detected on the contour.

persistence.description: Topological persistence score for extremum-based landmarks.

midline.description: Vertical centerline of the figure as [dx, dy] points (dx near 0).

strokes.description: Interior detail lines (armor panels, seams, contour details).

region.description: Body region this stroke belongs to.

arc_length_hu.description: Total arc length of the stroke polyline.

chord_length_hu.description: Straight-line distance from start to end.

orientation_deg.description: Dominant orientation in degrees (-90..90), null if ambiguous.

mean_curvature.description: Mean signed curvature along the stroke.

max_abs_curvature.description: Maximum absolute curvature along the stroke.

semantic_type.description: Classified stroke type based on geometry and region.

symmetry.description: Bilateral symmetry measurements at regular vertical intervals.

samples.description: Keyed by dy value as string (e.g. '0.25', '0.50'). Each entry compares right and left half-widths.

measurements.description: Dense width profile with first and second derivatives, keyed by dy.

step_hu.description: Vertical step between scanlines in HU.

scanlines.description: Keyed by dy value as string (e.g. '0.00', '0.05'). Each entry gives bilateral width and derivatives.

d_width_d_dy.description: First derivative of width w.r.t. dy.

curvature.description: Second derivative of width w.r.t. dy.

parametric.description: B-spline curve fits for each body segment between consecutive landmarks.

inflection_dy.description: Vertical positions where curvature changes sign within this segment.

complexity.description: Segment complexity score based on curvature variation and inflection count.

proportion.description: Figure proportions: head count, segment ratios, width ratios, canonical comparisons, and ML feature vector.

segment_ratios.description: Height of each landmark-to-landmark segment as a fraction of total height.

width_ratios.description: Right-side dx at each landmark as a fraction of figure height.

composite_ratios.description: Derived ratios: shoulder/hip, waist/hip, upper/lower body, torso/leg.

measured_positions_hu.description: Absolute dy position of each landmark in HU.

candidates.description: Alternative contour extraction results and their quality scores.

curvature.description: Discrete curvature kappa along the right-side contour.

extrema.description: Top highest-|kappa| points: sharp contour features (joints, armor edges).

inflections.description: Points where curvature changes sign (convex/concave transitions).

body_regions.description: Anatomical zone boundaries with stroke and landmark assignments.

cross_section_topology.description: Number of contour crossings per horizontal scanline, indicating arm separation and multi-part topology.

fourier_descriptors.description: Elliptic Fourier Descriptors for shape matching. Low-order harmonics capture global shape; higher orders capture detail.

energy_concentration.description: Fraction of total shape energy captured by first N harmonics.

width_profile.description: Clean 1D width signal dx(dy) with slope, curvature, filtered extrema, and statistics.

prominence_threshold.description: Minimum prominence (HU) to keep an extremum.

area_profile.description: Silhouette area (HU^2) decomposed by body region and cumulative at landmarks.

contour_normals.description: Outward-facing unit normal vectors along the right-side contour, subsampled.

shape_vector.description: Fixed-dimension shape descriptor for ML: 16 normalized width samples + 5 ratios = 21 dimensions.

vector.description: The feature vector. Length must equal dimension.

dy_sample_points.description: Vertical positions where width was sampled.

hu_moments.description: Hu's 7 invariant moments: translation-, scale-, and rotation-invariant shape descriptors (Hu, 1962).

turning_function.description: Cumulative tangent angle theta(s) parameterised by normalised arc-length (Arkin et al., 1991).

max_turning_rate.description: Location and magnitude of the sharpest turn (highest |d_theta/ds|).

convex_hull.description: Convex hull, solidity, negative space, and concavity decomposition (Zunic & Rosin, 2004).

gesture_line.description: PCA-based action line: dominant pose axis, lean, contrapposto, and per-landmark lateral deviations (Loomis, 1943).

centroid.description: Centroid of the contour point cloud.

cubic_fit_coefficients.description: Coefficients [a3, a2, a1, a0] of a cubic polynomial dx = a3*dy^3 + a2*dy^2 + a1*dy + a0 fit to the gesture line.

curvature_scale_space.description: Multi-scale curvature (CSS): curvature recomputed at multiple Gaussian smoothing scales (Mokhtarian & Mackworth, 1992). Features persisting across scales are structural.

persistent_features.description: dy locations appearing in top curvature extrema across multiple scales.

style_deviation.description: Per-landmark deviation from the Loomis 8-head academic canon, plus aggregate stylisation distance.

l2_stylisation_distance.description: Euclidean distance of the deviation vector. Higher = more stylised.

volumetric_estimates.description: Three 3D volume approximations from the 2D silhouette: cylindrical, ellipsoidal, and Pappus (solid of revolution).

biomechanics.description: Biomechanical segment parameters from Dempster/Winter cadaver studies: mass fractions, center-of-mass positions, radii of gyration.

whole_body_com.description: Whole-body centre of mass estimated from segment CoMs x mass fractions.

medial_axis.description: Topological skeleton: main axis with inscribed radius (half-width) at each dy level.

thickness_statistics.description: Summary statistics of inscribed radius along the main axis.

thinning_ratio.description: min/max radius. Lower = more extreme width variation.

branch_points.description: Locations where cross-section topology changes (skeleton branches).

shape_complexity.description: Multiple shape complexity and regularity metrics: entropy, fractal dimension, compactness, rectangularity, eccentricity, roughness.

value.description: From covariance ellipse. 0 = circular, 1 = maximally elongated.
